words.exampleCn: 演讲比赛是练习英语的好机会。

words.meaning: 区别，辨别；辨认出；使杰出
words.example: It is hard to distinguish the twins from each other.
words.exampleCn: 很难把这对双胞胎区分开。

words.example: He covered himself with a warm blanket.
words.exampleCn: 他给自己盖上了一条暖和的毯子。

words.example: His arrogance made him unpopular in the team.
words.exampleCn: 他的傲慢使他在队里不受欢迎。

words.example: We are living in the digital era.
words.exampleCn: 我们生活在数字时代。

words.example: Praise is a good stimulus for young learners.
words.exampleCn: 表扬对年幼的学习者是很好的激励。

words.meaning: 随便走，漫游；徜徉；漫谈某事；漫步；徘徊
words.example: We roamed around the old town all afternoon.
words.exampleCn: 我们整个下午都在老城里闲逛。

words.example: You can go out to play provided you finish your homework.
words.exampleCn: 只要你完成作业，就可以出去玩。

words.meaning: 比较，对比，对照；比喻，比拟
words.example: The chart shows a comparison of the two teams.
words.exampleCn: 这张图表对两支队伍做了比较。

words.meaning: 宣传，宣扬；公众的注意，名声
words.example: The new film got a lot of publicity online.
words.exampleCn: 这部新电影在网上获得了大量宣传。

words.meaning: 依靠，依赖；信赖，相信；决定于，视……而定
words.example: You can depend on your teammates for help.
words.exampleCn: 你可以依靠队友的帮助。

words.meaning: 作品；写作，作曲；结构，组成，成分
words.example: We wrote a composition about our dream job.
words.exampleCn: 我们写了一篇关于理想工作的作文。

words.meaning: 建筑学；建筑设计，建筑风格；[计]体系结构
words.example: The architecture of the old temple is amazing.
words.exampleCn: 这座古庙的建筑风格令人惊叹。

words.example: The runner jumped over every hurdle easily.
words.exampleCn: 这位选手轻松跃过了每一个栏架。

words.meaning: 协力合作，团队合作；配合
words.example: Good teamwork won us the championship.
words.exampleCn: 良好的团队合作让我们赢得了冠军。

words.meaning: 潮湿的；潮湿，湿气；使潮湿；减弱，抑制；（使）沮丧
words.example: The towel is still damp from the rain.
words.exampleCn: 毛巾被雨淋得还是潮的。

words.meaning: 全体职工，工作人员；棒；（军队的）全体参谋人员；为……配备人员；任职于
words.example: The staff at the library are very helpful.
words.exampleCn: 图书馆的工作人员非常乐于助人。

words.example: The dove is a symbol of peace.
words.exampleCn: 鸽子是和平的象征。

words.example: He is apt to forget his keys at home.
words.exampleCn: 他老是把钥匙忘在家里。

words.meaning: 同种类的，由相同（或同类型）事物（或人）组成的
words.example: The mixture should be smooth and homogeneous.
words.exampleCn: 这种混合物应该均匀而顺滑。

words.example: Turn off the tap to conserve water.
words.exampleCn: 关上水龙头以节约用水。

words.meaning: 痉挛；抽搐；（活动、情感等的）突发、阵发
words.example: He felt a sudden spasm in his leg during the race.
words.exampleCn: 比赛中他的腿突然抽筋了。

words.example: Germs are invisible to the naked eye.
words.exampleCn: 细菌是肉眼看不见的。

words.example: He devotes an hour to reading every day.
words.exampleCn: 他每天花一小时读书。

words.meaning: （用图等）说明，举例说明，阐明；给……作插图说明
words.example: The teacher used a picture to illustrate the idea.
words.exampleCn: 老师用一张图片来说明这个概念。

words.meaning: 一层梯田；一排并列的房子；阳台
words.example: Farmers grow rice on the terraces of the hill.
words.exampleCn: 农民们在山坡的梯田上种水稻。

words.meaning: 动力的；活跃的，充满活力的，精力充沛的
words.example: Our new monitor is dynamic and full of ideas.
words.exampleCn: 我们的新班长精力充沛，点子很多。

words.example: He worked hard throughout the whole year.
words.exampleCn: 他一整年都很努力。

words.example: He looks smart in his new school uniform.
words.exampleCn: 他穿上新校服看起来很精神。

words.example: Don't criticise others for honest mistakes.
words.exampleCn: 不要因无心的错误批评别人。

words.meaning: 在……较远的一边；超出；除……之外
words.example: The village is beyond those mountains.
words.exampleCn: 村子在那些山的那一边。

words.example: Most tourists stay on the coast and rarely visit the hinterland.
words.exampleCn: 大多数游客待在沿海，很少去内陆地区。
